name: BXP, Inc.
business: BXP is a fully integrated, self-administered and self-managed REIT that develops, owns, and manages primarily premier workplaces. It generates revenue by leasing office, retail, residential, and hotel space to clients, with properties concentrated in six gateway markets: Boston, Los Angeles, New York, San Francisco, Seattle, and Washington, DC.

exposures.sentence: risks associated with our use of AI and cyber security breaches, incidents and compromises, as well as other significant disruptions of our information technology (IT) networks and related systems, which support our operations and our buildings;
sustained changes in client preferences and space utilization due to remote work models and/or changes from workforce reductions due to artificial intelligence

catalysts.sentence: We expect to publish our next report in April 2026.
we remain on track to achieve occupancy improvements by year-end 2026, consistent with the targets outlined at our September 2025 Investor Day.
